title: Graphify + Obsidian + Claude Code = CHEAT CODE
summary: Chase AI demonstrates a workflow combining Graphify for repository analysis, Obsidian for knowledge management, and Claude Code for code generation. The integration merges knowledge graph insights into Obsidian vaults to improve Claude Code's contextual understanding and output quality.
